requirement_topic.en: INNORPI NT Standards and Project-Specified Standards
requirement_topic.zh: INNORPI NT标准及项目指定标准
requirement_topic.zht: INNORPI NT標準及項目指定標準

summary.en: INNORPI is Tunisia's national standards body and may adopt Tunisian NT standards based on international standards. For solar PV inverters, exporters should verify whether the tender, customs route, conformity route, or project owner cites a Tunisian NT adoption of IEC 62109 or other PV, EMC, low-voltage, or grid standards. A standard may be voluntary in general but mandatory once referenced by regulation, procurement, connection approval, or contract.
summary.zh: INNORPI是突尼斯国家标准机构，可采纳以国际标准为基础的突尼斯NT标准。对于太阳能光伏逆变器，出口商应核验招标文件、海关路径、合格评定路径或项目业主是否引用IEC 62109或其他光伏、电磁兼容、低压或电网标准的突尼斯NT采纳版本。标准一般可能是自愿的，但一旦被法规、采购、并网批准或合同引用，即可能成为强制要求。
summary.zht: INNORPI是突尼西亞國家標準機構，可採納以國際標準為基礎的突尼西亞NT標準。對於太陽能光伏逆變器，出口商應核驗招標文件、海關路徑、合格評定路徑或項目業主是否引用IEC 62109或其他光伏、電磁相容、低壓或電網標準的突尼西亞NT採納版本。標準一般可能是自願的，但一旦被法規、採購、併網批准或合同引用，即可能成為強制要求。

standards_or_laws: Applicable Norme Tunisienne (NT) standards published or adopted by INNORPI
IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 where adopted, cited, or contractually required

summary.en: Chinese exporters often provide GB/T or NB/T reports, CQC files, and IEC CB reports. The Tunisia file should identify which documents are direct IEC evidence and which are China-specific evidence requiring equivalence review.
summary.zh: 中国出口商通常提供GB/T或NB/T报告、CQC资料和IEC CB报告。突尼斯资料包应区分哪些文件是直接IEC证据，哪些是需要等效性审查的中国特定证据。
summary.zht: 中國出口商通常提供GB/T或NB/T報告、CQC資料和IEC CB報告。突尼西亞資料包應區分哪些文件是直接IEC證據，哪些是需要等效性審查的中國特定證據。

standards_or_laws: NB/T 32004 series where used by buyer or project
IEC CB test report and certificate where available

gap.en: Before shipment, request the buyer's exact NT / IEC list and check whether INNORPI, customs, utility, financing, or project procurement requires original certificates, French documentation, Arabic / French labels, or local conformity steps.
gap.zh: 出货前，应向买方索取准确的NT / IEC清单，并确认INNORPI、海关、公用事业单位、融资方或项目采购是否要求证书原件、法文资料、阿拉伯语/法语标签或当地合格评定步骤。
gap.zht: 出貨前，應向買方索取準確的NT / IEC清單，並確認INNORPI、海關、公用事業單位、融資方或項目採購是否要求證書原件、法文資料、阿拉伯語／法語標籤或當地合格評定步驟。

mandatory_status.target: Standards are not automatically mandatory solely because they exist; they become mandatory when incorporated into Tunisian regulation, customs or conformity controls, grid-connection approval, tender, financing, insurance, or contract requirements
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T or NB/T evidence is not automatically accepted in Tunisia unless the Tunisian authority, utility, tender, or buyer recognizes it or accepts a mapped equivalence file

source.publisher: Institut National de la Normalisation et de la Propriété Industrielle (INNORPI)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat INNORPI / NT applicability as a scope question, not a guess. The export file should name each NT or IEC standard required by the Tunisian project and show how China evidence maps to it.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将INNORPI / NT适用性作为范围问题处理，而非猜测。出口资料包应列明突尼斯项目要求的每一项NT或IEC标准，并展示中国证据如何对应。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將INNORPI / NT適用性作為範圍問題處理，而非猜測。出口資料包應列明突尼西亞項目要求的每一項NT或IEC標準，並展示中國證據如何對應。
